key_evidence: Army Chief General Asim Munir Tampa speech: 'if we are going to go down, we will take half the world down with us'
ISPR characterized Indian Army Chief remarks as 'madness and warmongering'; issued its own deterrence warning
Bilateral nuclear-restraint-norm erosion arc (paired with India ISPR exchange)
Floor-proximity context: May 21 band-crossing-proposed-downward (22.7→20.3) remains pending founder review

events.label: Army Chief nuclear-threat rhetoric (Tampa speech) + ISPR reinforcement

methodology_note: First application of NUCLEAR-THREAT-RHETORIC-AS-SCORED-GOVERNANCE-SIGNAL methodology novel flag. SYS dimension hit (-5.0) and AWR dimension hit (-2.5) at sub-threshold magnitude. Documented as Tier B sub-threshold movement; NOT formal apply. Founder review required on whether nuclear rhetoric scoring should be promoted to formal protocol.
open_pending_proposal: May 21 band-crossing-proposed-downward (22.7→20.3) remains pending; sub-threshold movement reinforces direction.
